title: HG Drain Unblocker, Drain Sticks, Powerful Cleaner, Sink Unblocker, pack of 6
features: Prevents Sink Blockages: Keep your sink clear with HG drain cleaner, preventing blockages and ensuring smooth drainage
Odor-Free Drains: Say goodbye to unpleasant odors. HG drain cleaner not only prevents blockages but also tackles annoying smells
Natural Kitchen Drain Cleaning: Experience natural cleaning in your kitchen drain. HG drain cleaner uses enzymes to dissolve food remains effectively
Safe for All Pipes: Trust HG drain cleaner to be safe for all pipes. Maintain a clog-free sink without worrying about damage
Easy and efficient: place one stick in the drain every month and repeat as needed. No microplastics, just a user-friendly solution for a clean kitchen
description: Product Description These handy sticks are designed for optimal sink maintenance, effortlessly preventing blockages and annoying odors. Enriched with enzymes, the sticks dissolve grease and food residues naturally, ensuring a clean and smoothly flowing drain. Each pack contains 6 sticks, providing six months of blockage prevention under standard sink usage. For heavily used sinks, use the drain cleaner stick more frequently. As part of HG's extensive range of unblockers, the HG drain cleaner stands out as an expert solution. With options like HG kitchen unblocker, HG hair unblocker, and HG liquid unblocker, HG addresses specific blockage issues in various areas of your home. For persistent blockages, the powerful HG duo unblocker is the ultimate solution. Using HG drain cleaner is simple - just place one stick in the drain every month and repeat as needed. With HG's commitment to expertise and innovation since 1969, our cleaning solutions stand by consumers, offering tailored solutions for every room in the house. Enjoy a hassle-free sink with HG's Unblocker Sticks Ingredients cleaner Directions Insert one stick into the drain once a month. See more
